title: MyPet
description: Transform any mob into your loyal companion. Train them. Ride them. Fight alongside them.
body:
![MyPet Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MyPetORG/MyPet-SkilltreeCreator/refs/heads/main/public/img/logo_100.png) [![Wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/📖_Wiki-4CAF50?style=for-the-badge)](https://wiki.mypet-plugin.de) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/🐙_GitHub-333?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/MyPetORG/MyPet) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/💬_Discord-5865F2?style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/GtcdWFw) [![bStats Servers](https://img.shields.io/bstats/servers/778)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/MyPet/778) [![bStats Players](https://img.shields.io/bstats/players/778)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/MyPet/778) [![Spiget Rating](https://img.shields.io/spiget/rating/12725)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/mypet.12725/) [![GitHub Contributors](https://img.shields.io/github/contributors/MyPetORG/MyPet)](https://github.com/MyPetORG/MyPet/graphs/contributors) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/145501914795212800)](https://discord.gg/GtcdWFw) [![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/MyPetORG/MyPet)](https://github.com/MyPetORG/MyPet/blob/master/LICENSE)

Transform any mob into your loyal companion.
Train them. Ride them. Fight alongside them.

--- # 🐾 MyPet ### The Ultimate Pet Companion Plugin for Minecraft Servers What if that zombie you just defeated could become your most trusted ally? What if you could ride a spider into battle, or have a skeleton archer defend your base? With **MyPet**, your imagination is the only limit. MyPet is one of the most feature-rich and beloved pet plugins in the Minecraft community — actively developed, deeply customizable, and trusted by hundreds of servers worldwide. --- ## ✨ What Makes MyPet Special? ### 🎯 Tame Almost Anything Forget being limited to wolves and cats. MyPet lets players capture and tame **nearly every mob type** in Minecraft — from the humble chicken to the fearsome warden. Each creature can become a loyal companion ready to fight by your side, carry your items, or simply follow you on your adventures. ### 📈 Watch Them Grow Your pets aren't static — they **evolve**. As your companion fights alongside you and gains experience, it levels up, unlocking new abilities and becoming increasingly powerful. The leveling system creates a genuine sense of progression and attachment to your pet. ### 🛠️ Fully Customizable Skilltrees MyPet features an extensive skill system that transforms your pets from simple followers into versatile companions. Server owners have **complete control**. Create custom skilltrees that define exactly which skills unlock at each level. Want a tank pet that absorbs damage? A speedy scout? A walking storage unit? Design skilltrees that match your server's gameplay style. --- ## 🔧 Server Administrator Features ### 🔐 Granular Permission Control Fine-tune exactly who can tame which mob types, access specific skilltrees, use commands, and more. MyPet integrates seamlessly with your existing permission system. ### ⚙️ Flexible Capture Requirements Configure leash flags to control how players obtain pets: - Require the mob to be below a certain health percentage - Require specific items in inventory - Limit by world, biome, or region - Require the player to deal the killing blow - And many more combinable conditions ### 💾 Database Support Store pet data in **SQLite** (default), **MySQL**, or **MongoDB**. Perfect for networks that need synchronized pet data across multiple servers. ### 🔗 Plugin Integrations MyPet plays nicely with your existing setup: - **Citizens** — Store pets via NPC interactions - **WorldGuard** — Region-specific flags for pet behavior - **PlaceholderAPI** — Display pet info anywhere - **BossShopPro** — Sell pets and pet items in shops - **Towny, Heroes, Factions** — And more! --- ## 🎮 Player Experience ### 📋 Intuitive Commands Players manage their pets with simple, memorable commands: | Command | Description | |---------|-------------| | `/petinfo` | Check your pet's stats and status | | `/petinventory` | Access your pet's backpack | | `/petbehavior` | Change combat behavior | | `/petswitch` · `/petstore` | Manage multiple pets | | `/petname` | Give your companion a custom name | ### 📦 Multiple Pet Storage Players can capture and store multiple pets, switching between them as needed. Configure storage limits per permission group or per skill level to create progression tiers. ### 🤝 Pet Trading Enable players to trade pets with each other — building a player-driven pet economy on your server. ### 🍖 Hunger System Optional hunger mechanics add another layer of gameplay. Feed your pets to keep them healthy — a hungry pet has reduced stats and beacon range. --- ## 💬 What Server Owners Say > "what would happen without mypet, honestly my server would be a bland server, thanks for making this plugin, i love it" > > — [tungthpt10, 11/04/2025](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/mypet.12725/reviews?resource_rating_id=482672) > "i already know the plugin from servers i played on years ago and i am glad that it is being further developed and is so easy to set up." > > — [crowcurl, 01/12/2025](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/mypet.12725/reviews?resource_rating_id=468419) > "Great plugin with so much configurability! I love how many ways you can customize the pets to fit your needs/server setup." > > — [LandOfTheEast, 11/03/2024](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/mypet.12725/reviews?resource_rating_id=464984) --- ## 🚀 Getting Started 1. Download MyPet and place it in your `plugins` folder 2. Restart your server 3. Configure `config.yml` and `pet-config.yml` to your preferences 4. Set up permissions for your players 5. Create and customize skilltrees using the [skilltree creator](https://skilltree.mypet-plugin.de) (or use the defaults) 6. Let your players tame their first companions! --- ## ❤️ Support Development MyPet is free and open source. If you love the plugin, consider: - ⭐ Starring us on [GitHub](https://github.com/MyPetORG/MyPet) - 🐛 [Reporting bugs and suggesting features](https://github.com/MyPetORG/MyPet/issues) - 🌐 [Contributing translations](https://crowdin.com/project/mypet-translations) - 💬 Joining our [Discord community](https://discord.gg/GtcdWFw)
